svg.title: AI Gateway in Rust — Architecture Overview
svg.desc: Layered architecture diagram showing client request flow through the AI Gateway into multiple LLM providers

g.text: TLS termination · HTTP/1.1 + HTTP/2 · request parsing
Model routing · fallback chains · retries · circuit breaker
Caching (Redis) · cost metering · guardrails · stream proxy

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how the OpenAI adapter works in a Rust AI Gateway')
